name: charchagram-monorepo
description: CharchaGram — civic accountability platform monorepo (Next.js frontend + Express backend)

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=apps/frontend && npm run build --workspace=apps/backend
scripts.build:backend: echo 'Backend has no compile step (ESM JS)' && exit 0
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=apps/backend && npm run test --workspace=apps/frontend
